title: Cobblemon Bird Nests
body:
# Cobblemon Bird Nests
A [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) and [Bird Nests](https://modrinth.com/mod/birdnest) compatibility datapack.\
Modifies the nest loot table from Bird Nests so that it contains items from Cobblemon.

Here's what you are likely to get from the nests of bird pokémons.
![Inventory showing all items that can be obtained from bird nests using this datapack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d145e2d1380bf46d5f312ed25c3a74d8273fdf5f.png)

# Loot Table Details
| Items               | Count | Weight | Chance |
|:--------------------|:-----:|:------:|-------:|
| Sticks              | 1-2   | 5/75   | ~6.67% |
| Iron Nuggets        | 1     | 5/75   | ~6.67% |
| Gold Nuggets        | 1     | 5/75   | ~6.67% |
| Wheat Seeds         | 1     | 5/75   | ~6.67% |
| Vivichoke Seeds     | 1     | 5/75   | ~6.67% |
| Oran Berry          | 1     | 5/75   | ~6.67% |
| Health Feather      | 1-4   | 5/75   | ~6.67% |
| Muscle Feather      | 1-4   | 5/75   | ~6.67% |
| Resist Feather      | 1-4   | 5/75   | ~6.67% |
| Genius Feather      | 1-4   | 5/75   | ~6.67% |
| Clever Feather      | 1-4   | 5/75   | ~6.67% |
| Swift Feather       | 1-4   | 5/75   | ~6.67% |
| Relic Coin          | 1     | 5/75   | ~6.67% |
| Tumblestone         | 1     | 3/75   | 4%     |
| Black Tumblestone   | 1     | 3/75   | 4%     |
| Sky Tumblestone     | 1     | 3/75   | 4%     |
| Lucky Egg           | 1     | 1/75   | ~1.33% |
